revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - include flag variants
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Ottoman Empire | flag alias = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | flag alias-1299 = Flag of the Ottoman Sultanate (1299-1453).svg | flag alias-1453 = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1453-1517).svg | flag alias-1517 = Flag of Ottoman Empire (1517-1793).svg | flag alias-1517b = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1517-1844).svg | flag alias-1793 = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (eight pointed star).svg | flag alias-1844 = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | link alias-army = Ottoman Army | flag alias-naval = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | flag alias-naval-1793 = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | flag alias-naval-1844 = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | link alias-naval = Ottoman Navy | flag alias-air force = Ottomaanse Vlag.png | link alias-air force = Ottoman Air Force | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Ottoman Empire (1844–1922).svg | link alias-navy = Ottoman Navy | flag alias-red = Ottoman red flag.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1299 | var2 = 1453 | var3 = 1517 | var4 = 1517b | var5 = 1793 | var6 = 1844 | var7 = naval-1793 | var8 = naval-1844 | var9 = red | related1 = Turkey </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Ottoman_Empire here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Ottoman_Empire for full history.
